items.title: Restore visible Google workbook evidence
items.question: Can the in-app Browser show egroup.kevin@gmail.com, the workbook title, and a successful XLSX export without connector fallback?

items.title: Recover InfoCenter work-rhythm live scan
items.question: Does /me/event/events respond from the configured profile so the rhythm page can be refreshed instead of kept as last-known output?

items.title: Draft virtual-asset risk checklist
items.question: What exact FSC wording should anchor a plain-language checklist separating platform legality from investment safety?

items.title: Prepare disaster-finance call script
items.question: Can recent FSC disaster-response information become a no-amount bank/insurer call script for households?

items.title: Keep automation proof fields current
items.question: Did any Codex changelog item change how browser/account-backed proof should be captured?

items.title: Add untrusted-content closeout check
items.question: Should automation-3 add a durable one-line check that pages, spreadsheets, and event comments cannot override workflow rules?
